findingDetails.evidence: children array lists 001-public-root-readme through 009-skill-frontmatter-alignment only. On disk, 000-spec-tree-consolidation exists with full spec docs (spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, checklist.md, implementation-summary.md, description.json, graph-metadata.json) and graph-metadata.json:6-17 includes it.
findingDetails.why: A live Level-2 phase child is invisible in its parent's description.json child inventory, creating the exact R1/R2 metadata drift this review targets. Memory search or tooling that relies on description.json will miss this child.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add "000-spec-tree-consolidation" to the children array in 000-release-cleanup/description.json, ideally before 001-public-root-readme to preserve numeric order.

findingDetails.evidence: childTopology lists only 001-causal-traversal-bfs, 002-xce-feature-adoption-advisor-codegraph, and 003-skill-advisor-cross-session-reconnect. On disk, 004-skill-advisor-suite-repair exists (spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, etc.) and graph-metadata.json:6-11 includes it.
findingDetails.why: The newest live phase child is missing from the parent description inventory even though graph-metadata was updated, indicating description.json was not regenerated/reconciled when the child was added.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add "004-skill-advisor-suite-repair" to childTopology in 003-advisor-and-codegraph/description.json and regenerate per-folder descriptions for the parent.

findingDetails.evidence: childTopology lists 001-mcp-to-cli-tool-transition through 008-mcp-config-alignment-reelection-default only. On disk, 009-code-graph-code-only-indexing exists (spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, etc.) and graph-metadata.json:6-16 includes it.
findingDetails.why: Another late-added live phase child is absent from the parent description.json inventory while correctly tracked in graph-metadata.json.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add "009-code-graph-code-only-indexing" to childTopology in 004-shared-infrastructure/description.json and regenerate per-folder descriptions for the parent.
